sentences.target: Je cueille des fraises au jardin.

translations.fr: Je cueille des fraises au jardin.
translations.en: I'm picking strawberries in the garden.
translations.es: Estoy recogiendo fresas en el jardín.
translations.yue: 我喺花園度摘士多啤梨。
translations.vi: Tôi đang hái dâu tây trong vườn.
translations.nl: Ik pluk aardbeien in de tuin.
translations.hi: मैं बगीचे में स्ट्रॉबेरी तोड़ रहा हूँ.
translations.id: Saya sedang memetik stroberi di kebun.
translations.ja: 庭でイチゴを摘んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; grammatical subject of the verb.
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 1st person singular, meaning ‘to pick/gather’.
Indefinite plural article introducing a non-specific plural noun.
Common noun, plural; direct object of the verb.
Contraction of the preposition ‘à’ and the definite article ‘le’; introduces a locative complement.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘au’, indicating location.

sentences.target: Tu peux m’aider à cueillir ces fleurs.
sentences.reading: /ty pø mɛde a kœjiʁ se flœʁ/

translations.fr: Tu peux m’aider à cueillir ces fleurs.
translations.ipa: /ty pø mɛde a kœjiʁ se flœʁ/
translations.en: Can you help me pick these flowers?
translations.de: Kannst du mir helfen, diese Blumen zu pflücken?
translations.it: Puoi aiutarmi a raccogliere questi fiori?
translations.ko: 이 꽃들을 따는 데 도와줄 수 있어요?
translations.yue: 你可唔可以幫我摘呢啲花呀？
translations.ru: Можешь помочь мне сорвать эти цветы?
translations.pt: Você pode me ajudar a colher estas flores?
translations.he: אתה יכול לעזור לי לקטוף את הפרחים האלה?
translations.tr: Bu çiçekleri toplamama yardım eder misin?
translations.vi: Bạn có thể giúp tôi hái những bông hoa này không?
translations.ar: هل يمكنك مساعدتي في قطف هذه الزهور؟
translations.nl: Kun je me helpen deze bloemen te plukken?
translations.uk: Ти можеш допомогти мені зірвати ці квіти?
translations.hu: Tudsz segíteni leszedni ezeket a virágokat?
translations.hi: क्या आप इन फूलों को तोड़ने में मेरी मदद कर सकते हैं?
translations.pl: Czy możesz pomóc mi zerwać te kwiaty?
translations.el: Μπορείς να με βοηθήσεις να κόψω αυτά τα λουλούδια;
translations.nb: Kan du hjelpe meg å plukke disse blomstene?
translations.id: Bisakah kamu membantu saya memetik bunga ini?
translations.sv: Kan du hjälpa mig att plocka de här blommorna?
translations.ro: Mă poți ajuta să culeg aceste flori?
translations.cs: Můžeš mi pomoct natrhat tyhle květiny?
translations.da: Kan du hjælpe mig med at plukke disse blomster?
translations.fi: Voitko auttaa minua poimimaan nämä kukat?
translations.ja: この花を摘むのを手伝ってくれますか？

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 2nd person singular; expresses ability/permission.
Clitic ‘m’ (me) elided before vowel and attached to the infinitive ‘aider’; non-finite verb phrase functioning as complement of ‘peux’.
Preposition introducing an infinitival complement (‘à cueillir’).
Infinitive verb complement indicating the action.
Demonstrative determiner marking specific plural noun.
Common noun, plural; direct object of ‘cueillir’.

sentences.target: On cueille des tomates chez Mamie.

translations.fr: On cueille des tomates chez Mamie.
translations.es: Estamos recogiendo tomates en casa de la abuela.
translations.it: Stiamo raccogliendo pomodori a casa della nonna.
translations.ko: 우리는 할머니 댁에서 토마토를 따고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在奶奶家摘西红柿。
translations.yue: 我哋喺阿嫲屋企摘番茄。
translations.pt: Estamos colhendo tomates na casa da avó.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang hái cà chua ở nhà bà.
translations.ar: نحن نقطف الطماطم في بيت جدتي.
translations.hi: हम दादी के घर टमाटर तोड़ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Μαζεύουμε ντομάτες στο σπίτι της γιαγιάς.
translations.id: Kami sedang memetik tomat di rumah nenek.
translations.ja: 祖母の家でトマトを収穫しています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun meaning ‘one’ or ‘we’.
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Indefinite plural article introducing a non-specific plural noun.
Common noun, plural; direct object of the verb.
Preposition meaning ‘at the home/place of’.
Proper noun used as a name/title; complement of ‘chez’.

sentences.target: Ils cueillent des champignons après la pluie.
sentences.reading: /il kœj de ʃɑ̃piɲɔ̃ apʁɛ la plɥi/

translations.fr: Ils cueillent des champignons après la pluie.
translations.ipa: /il kœj de ʃɑ̃piɲɔ̃ apʁɛ la plɥi/
translations.en: They're picking mushrooms after the rain.
translations.es: Están recogiendo setas después de la lluvia.
translations.de: Sie sammeln Pilze nach dem Regen.
translations.it: Stanno raccogliendo funghi dopo la pioggia.
translations.ko: 비가 온 뒤에 버섯을 따고 있어요.
translations.pt: Eles estão colhendo cogumelos depois da chuva.
translations.vi: Họ đang hái nấm sau cơn mưa.
translations.nl: Ze plukken paddenstoelen na de regen.
translations.hi: वे बारिश के बाद मशरूम तोड़ रहे हैं.
translations.id: Mereka sedang memetik jamur setelah hujan.
translations.ja: 雨上がりにキノコを採っています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person plural.
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural.
Indefinite plural article introducing a non-specific plural noun.
Common noun, plural; direct object of the verb.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Definite article, feminine singular, marking the noun ‘pluie’.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘après’.

es: Estoy recogiendo fresas en el jardín.

Sie sammeln Pilze nach dem Regen.
it: Puoi aiutarmi a raccogliere questi fiori?
Stiamo raccogliendo pomodori a casa della nonna.
Stanno raccogliendo funghi dopo la pioggia.
ko: 이 꽃들을 따는 데 도와줄 수 있어요?
우리는 할머니 댁에서 토마토를 따고 있어요.
비가 온 뒤에 버섯을 따고 있어요.
zh-Hans: 我们在奶奶家摘西红柿。
yue: 我喺花園度摘士多啤梨。
你可唔可以幫我摘呢啲花呀？

Estamos colhendo tomates na casa da avó.
Eles estão colhendo cogumelos depois da chuva.
he: אתה יכול לעזור לי לקטוף את הפרחים האלה?
tr: Bu çiçekleri toplamama yardım eder misin?
vi: Tôi đang hái dâu tây trong vườn.
Bạn có thể giúp tôi hái những bông hoa này không?
Chúng tôi đang hái cà chua ở nhà bà.
Họ đang hái nấm sau cơn mưa.
ar: هل يمكنك مساعدتي في قطف هذه الزهور؟
نحن نقطف الطماطم في بيت جدتي.
nl: Ik pluk aardbeien in de tuin.
Kun je me helpen deze bloemen te plukken?
Ze plukken paddenstoelen na de regen.
uk: Ти можеш допомогти мені зірвати ці квіти?
hu: Tudsz segíteni leszedni ezeket a virágokat?

क्या आप इन फूलों को तोड़ने में मेरी मदद कर सकते हैं?
हम दादी के घर टमाटर तोड़ रहे हैं.
वे बारिश के बाद मशरूम तोड़ रहे हैं.

el: Μπορείς να με βοηθήσεις να κόψω αυτά τα λουλούδια;
Μαζεύουμε ντομάτες στο σπίτι της γιαγιάς.

Bisakah kamu membantu saya memetik bunga ini?
Kami sedang memetik tomat di rumah nenek.
Mereka sedang memetik jamur setelah hujan.

ro: Mă poți ajuta să culeg aceste flori?
cs: Můžeš mi pomoct natrhat tyhle květiny?
da: Kan du hjælpe mig med at plukke disse blomster?
fi: Voitko auttaa minua poimimaan nämä kukat?
